name: Filigree
description: A physarum (slime-mold) agent network — a fine gold searching-web on pure black that consolidates into bright load-bearing veins as the music's energy sustains, then dissolves back to searching as it thins. ~262K agents deposit onto a diffusing trail map (Jones / Bleuje / Sage-Jenson model); continuous energy brightens and quickens the web (primary), and a structural peak blooms it into consolidated veins (the drop payoff). Kintsugi palette: gold veins on pure black. Graduated from the throwaway physarum sketch (PHYS.1-2); not yet certified.
author: Matt
